parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  function setCookie(name, value, days) {
    if (!value) return;
    var expires = '';
    if (days) {
      var d = new Date();
      d.setTime(d.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
      expires = '; expires=' + d.toUTCString();
    }
    document.cookie = name + '=' + encodeURIComponent(value) + expires + '; path=/; SameSite=Lax';
  }

  var email = ('{{VAR | JS | Form Email | LP}}' || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  var phoneRaw = ('{{VAR | JS | Form Phone | LP}}' || '').trim();
  var fullName = ('{{VAR | JS | Form Name | LP}}' || '').trim().toLowerCase();

  var phone = phoneRaw.replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (phone && phone.indexOf('55') !== 0) {
    phone = '55' + phone;
  }

  var nameParts = fullName ? fullName.split(/\s+/) : [];
  var firstName = nameParts.length ? nameParts[0] : '';
  var lastName = nameParts.length > 1 ? nameParts.slice(1).join(' ') : '';

  setCookie('lead_email', email, 90);
  setCookie('lead_telefone', phone, 90);
  setCookie('lead_first_name', firstName, 90);
  setCookie('lead_last_name', lastName, 90);
})();
</script>

<script>
(function() {

  });
})();
</script>

tag.name: HTML | CORE | Router Lead Classification | LP

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var now = Date.now();

  if (window.__leadRouterLastRun && (now - window.__leadRouterLastRun < 4000)) {
    return;
  }
  window.__leadRouterLastRun = now;

  function normalizeText(v) {
    return (v || '')
      .toString()
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .normalize('NFD')
      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
  }

  function getFieldValue(name) {
    var fields = document.querySelectorAll('[name="' + name + '"]');
    if (!fields || !fields.length) return '';

    for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {
      var el = fields[i];
      if (!el) continue;

      var tag = (el.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
      var type = (el.type || '').toLowerCase();

      if (type === 'radio' || type === 'checkbox') {
        if (el.checked) return (el.value || '').trim();
        continue;
      }

      if (tag === 'select' || tag === 'textarea' || tag === 'input') {
        if (el.value) return (el.value || '').trim();
      }
    }

    return '';
  }

  var ownerField = 'voc-dono-do-seu-negcio';
  var revenueField = 'qual-o-faturamento-mensal-da-sua-empresa';

  var ownerRaw = getFieldValue(ownerField);
  var revenueRaw = getFieldValue(revenueField);

  var owner = normalizeText(ownerRaw);
  var revenue = normalizeText(revenueRaw);

  var hasQualificationFields = !!(
    document.querySelector('[name="' + ownerField + '"]') &&
    document.querySelector('[name="' + revenueField + '"]')
  );

  var qualifiedRevenueRanges = {
    '21 mil a 50 mil': true,
    '51 mil a 100 mil': true,
    '101 mil a 500 mil': true,
    'acima de 500 mil': true
  };

  var revenueMatch = qualifiedRevenueRanges[revenue] === true;

  var eventName = '';
  var leadType = '';

  if (hasQualificationFields) {
    if (!owner || !revenue) {
      return;
    }

    if (owner === 'sim' && revenueMatch) {
      eventName = 'form_submit_qualified';
      leadType = 'qualified';
    } else {
      eventName = 'form_submit_unqualified';
      leadType = 'unqualified';
    }
  } else {
    eventName = 'form_submit_lead';
    leadType = 'lead';
  }

  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  window.dataLayer.push({
    event: eventName,
    lead_type: leadType,
    dono_negocio: ownerRaw,
    faturamento_mensal: revenueRaw
  });

  setTimeout(function () {
    window.__leadRouterLastRun = 0;
  }, 4000);
})();
</script>

tag.name: META | AUX | Block Auto Lead EST | LP

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  // evita instalar 2x
  if (window.__fbqLeadGuardInstalled) return;
  window.__fbqLeadGuardInstalled = true;

  function installGuard() {
    if (!window.fbq || window.fbq.__leadGuardWrapped) return;

    var original = window.fbq;

    function wrappedFbq() {
      try {
        var cmd = arguments[0];
        var eventName = arguments[1];
        var params = arguments[2] || {};

        // Bloqueia apenas o Lead que vem do Event Setup Tool (cs_est:true)
        if (cmd === 'track' && eventName === 'Lead' && params && params.cs_est === true) {
          return;
        }
      } catch (e) {}

      return original.apply(this, arguments);
    }

    // copia propriedades importantes do fbq original
    for (var k in original) {
      try { wrappedFbq[k] = original[k]; } catch (e) {}
    }
    wrappedFbq.__leadGuardWrapped = true;

    window.fbq = wrappedFbq;
    if (window._fbq) window._fbq = wrappedFbq;
  }

  // tenta instalar algumas vezes (caso fbq carregue logo após)
  var tries = 0;
  var t = setInterval(function () {
    installGuard();
    tries++;
    if (tries > 20) clearInterval(t); // ~2s
  }, 100);

})();
</script>

parameter.value: {{VAR | CNS | Google Ads Conversion ID | Global}}

<script>
(function () {
  if (window.__redirect_done) return;
  window.__redirect_done = true;

  var destinoBase = '{{VAR | LKP | Redirect Qualified | LP}}';

  if (!destinoBase || destinoBase.indexOf('http') !== 0) {
    destinoBase = 'https://lp.recordedefaturamento.com.br/obgmentoriav2';
  }

  var qs = window.location.search || '';
  var url = destinoBase;

  if (qs) {
    url += (url.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + qs.replace(/^\?/, '');
  }

  url += (url.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + 'lead_tipo=qualified';

  setTimeout(function () {
    window.location.href = url;
  }, 1200);
})();
</script>

<script>
(function () {
  if (window.__redirect_done) return;
  window.__redirect_done = true;

  var destinoBase = '{{VAR | LKP | Redirect Unqualified | LP}}';

  if (!destinoBase || destinoBase.indexOf('http') !== 0) {
    destinoBase = 'https://lp.recordedefaturamento.com.br/obgmentoria-v1';
  }

  var qs = window.location.search || '';
  var url = destinoBase;

  if (qs) {
    url += (url.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + qs.replace(/^\?/, '');
  }

  url += (url.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + 'lead_tipo=unqualified';

  setTimeout(function () {
    window.location.href = url;
  }, 1200);
})();
</script>
